title: While loop hang on delayed assign

features.name: delayed signed continuous assignment
features.description: Code should include a delayed continuous assignment to a signed wire with #1 delay and negative constant value

features.name: delayed function call in continuous assignment
features.description: Code should include a delayed continuous assignment using a function call that references a register

features.name: timed value checks in initial block with finish
features.description: Code should include an initial block with multiple #1 delays between value checks using assert-like macros

features.name: delayed $rtoi function call assignment
features.description: Code should include a delayed continuous assignment using $rtoi function call
